# programs.librewolf

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.librewolf`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.librewolf.configPath` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.darwinAppName` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.darwinDefaultsId` | `null or string` | The id for the darwin defaults in order to set policies |
| `programs.librewolf.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable LibreWolf. LibreWolf is a privacy enhanced Firefox fork. |
| `programs.librewolf.enableGnomeExtensions` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the GNOME Shell native host connector. Note, you also need to set the NixOS option services.gnome.gnome-browser-connector.enable to true . |
| `programs.librewolf.finalPackage` | `null or package (read only)` | Resulting LibreWolf package. |
| `programs.librewolf.languagePacks` | `list of string` | The language packs to install. Available language codes can be found on the releases page: https://releases.mozilla.org/pub/firefox/releases/${version}/linux-x86_64/xpi/ , replacing ${version} with the version of LibreWolf you have. If the version string of your Firefox derivative diverts from the upstream version, try setting the release option. |
| `programs.librewolf.name` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.nativeMessagingHosts` | `list of package` | Additional packages containing native messaging hosts that should be made available to LibreWolf extensions. |
| `programs.librewolf.package` | `null or package` | The LibreWolf package to use. If state version ≥ 19.09 then this should be a wrapped LibreWolf package. For earlier state versions it should be an unwrapped LibreWolf package. Set to null to disable installing LibreWolf. |
| `programs.librewolf.pkcs11Modules` | `list of package` | Additional packages to be loaded as PKCS #11 modules in Firefox. |
| `programs.librewolf.policies` | `attribute set of (JSON value)` | See list of policies . |
| `programs.librewolf.profileVersion` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.profiles` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of LibreWolf profiles. |
| `programs.librewolf.profilesPath` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.release` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | Attribute set of global LibreWolf settings and overrides. Refer to https://librewolf.net/docs/settings/ for details on supported values. |
| `programs.librewolf.vendorPath` | | |
| `programs.librewolf.wrappedPackageName` | | |
